PROJECT 02

ONLYSICK Streetwear

Project Type Identity / Content
Duration 3 Weeks
Focus Area Art Direction
Deliverables Visuals / Collateral

The Challenge

ONLYSICK wanted a brand identity that was bold, loud, and spoke directly to contemporary street culture. They needed visual moments that stood out instantly in digital feeds.

The Solution

We engineered a high-contrast visual system centered on raw, textured design assets. We built assets that optimized engagement, combining bold typography and stark icons.
